zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph de Gaël II於大約1039年出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉蓋爾時，他的父親Ralph de Gael The Staller Earl of Suffolk and Norfolk30歲，母親Gytha Countess of Hereford14歲。他於1075年與Emma de Breteuil在英國素福爾可艾可寧結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1096年在英國諾薩普頓史爾享年59歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾比特爾波洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph de Gaël II于大约1039年出生在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉蓋爾时，他的父亲Ralph de Gael The Staller Earl of Suffolk and Norfolk30岁，母亲Gytha Countess of Hereford14岁。他于1075年与Emma de Breteuil在英国素福爾可艾可寧结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1096年在英国諾薩普頓史爾享年59岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾比特爾波洛。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gaël
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Polish   Gawel  . This form of the surname is also found in Slovakia, Czechia, and Germany.
French: metonymic occupational name for a harvester, from javelle, a term for a sheaf of grain which was loosely bound and left on the ground to ripen.

variants.name: Gawel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Janusz, Franciszek, Halina, Jolanta, Lucyna, Ludwik, Tadeusz, Wladyslaw, Zbigniew.

Polish and in some cases probably also Sorbian (Gaweł): from the personal name Gaweł, derived from Latin Gallus (see Gall 3), the name borne by a 7th-century Irish missionary who was very active in central Europe. The extra syllable was introduced by analogy with Latin Paulus, which yielded Polish and (old) Sorbian Paweł. Compare Gavel and Czech Havel .

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph de Gaël II was born about 1039, in Gaël, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, his father, Ralph de Gael The Staller Earl of Suffolk and Norfolk, was 30 and his mother, Gytha Countess of Hereford, was 14. He married Emma de Breteuil in 1075, in Exning, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1096, in Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Peterborough, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph de Gaël II est né environ 1039, à Gaël, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, son père, Ralph de Gael The Staller Earl of Suffolk and Norfolk, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Gytha Countess of Hereford, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Emma de Breteuil en 1075, à Exning, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1096, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Peterborough, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph de Gaël II um 1039 in Gaël, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph de Gael The Staller Earl of Suffolk and Norfolk 30 und seine Mutter Gytha Countess of Hereford 14. Er hat 1075 in Exning, Suffolk, England Emma de Breteuil geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1096 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Peterborough, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Gaël II è nato il circa 1039 nel Gaël, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Ralph de Gael The Staller Earl of Suffolk and Norfolk, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Gytha Countess of Hereford, aveva 14 anni. Lui sposato Emma de Breteuil nel 1075, nel Exning, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1096, nel Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Peterborough, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph de Gaël IIが約1039年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインガeルで生まれた時，父Ralph de Gael The Staller Earl of Suffolk and Norfolkは30歳，母Gytha Countess of Herefordは14歳であった。1075年にイギリススフォルクエクスニングでEmma de Breteuilと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1096年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで59歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアペテルボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph de Gaël II(이)가 대략 1039년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 가e에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de Gael The Staller Earl of Suffolk and Norfolk(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Gytha Countess of Hereford(은)는 14세였다. 그는 1075년 영국 수폴크 스닝에서 Emma de Breteuil(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1096년 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 피터버루그h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Gaël II nasceu aproximadamente 1039, em Gaël, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Ralph de Gael The Staller Earl of Suffolk and Norfolk, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Gytha Countess of Hereford, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Emma de Breteuil em 1075, em Exning, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1096, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Peterborough, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph de Gaël II родился около 1039 г. в местности гаeл, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Ralph de Gael The Staller Earl of Suffolk and Norfolk было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Gytha Countess of Hereford, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Emma de Breteuil в 1075 г. в местности экснинг, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1096 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности питирбороую, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.

sm.about 1039–about 1096: e tusa o le 1039–e tusa o le 1096

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph de Gaël II nació aproximadamente 1039, en Gaël, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Ralph de Gael The Staller Earl of Suffolk and Norfolk, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Gytha Countess of Hereford, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Emma de Breteuil en 1075, en Exning, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1096, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Peterborough, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
